name: agent-extension-chrome
description: Chrome browser agent with neobrutalist side panel, tool validation, and an editor add-on for managing skills, memories, and rules.

scripts.build: vite build && vite build -c vite.config.background.js && vite build -c vite.config.content.js
scripts.build:extension: npm run build && echo 'Load the dist/ directory in Chrome (chrome://extensions → Load unpacked)'
